name: TimeInput
description: A time input component with separate fields for hours, minutes, seconds, and AM/PM with keyboard navigation support.
usage_guidelines: Use for time selection in forms.
Set format to '12' or '24' based on locale.
Enable showSeconds when precision is needed.
Use clearable for optional time fields.
Handle onChange to update form state.

styling_info.visual_description: An input with separate fields for hours, minutes, optional seconds, and AM/PM. Fields are separated by colons. Includes clock icon and optional clear button.

Dont: Don't forget to validate time ranges
Don't use for date selection (use DatePicker)
